column3: "Rehmannia reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to ease redness, swelling, and pain caused by irritated or infected body tissues.
"Rehmannia improves blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to help maintain balanced blood sugar when used in specific doses and treatments.
"Rehmannia boosts immune system" refers to its ability to strengthen the body's defense against infections and diseases.
"Rehmannia eases pain and discomfort" refers to its use as a healing plant helping with health concerns, providing relief from symptoms related to various conditions.

"Rehmannia promotes heart health" refers to its ability to enhance blood circulation, lower cholesterol levels, and maintain healthy 
         cardiovascular functions.
"Rehmannia fights free radicals" refers to its ability to protect cells from damage caused by harmful molecules called free radicals.
"Rehmannia reduces cancer risk" refers to its ability to lower the chances of developing this serious illness by using it as a natural remedy or supplement.
"Rehmannia enhances cognitive function" refers to its ability to improve mental skills such as learning, memory, and problem-solving.

"Rehmannia improves digestion" refers to its ability to enhance one's body's functions associated with breaking down foods and 
         absorbing nutrients effectively, leading to better overall health.
"Rehmannia promotes urination and detoxification" refers to its ability to help the body get rid of waste materials through increased urine production, which aids in cleansing the system.
